title: ECCCâ€™s Low Carbon Fuels Division Releases Registered Emission-Reduction Funding Program Credit Price and Compliance Credit Clearance Mechanism
content: In respect of the 2025 compliance period, the emission-reduction funding program credit price is $380 CAD, calculated in accordance with subsection 118(4) of the Regulations. Primary suppliers may use compliance credits created from a contribution made to a registered emission-reduction funding programs to satisfy up to 10% of their total reduction requirement. A list of registered emission-reduction funding programs is now available on the CFR Webpage: Compliance with the Clean Fuel Regulations. In respect of the 2025 compliance period, the maximum price of a compliance credit transferred through the compliance-credit clearance mechanism is $326 CAD, calculated in accordance with subsection 112(3) of the Regulations. A primary supplier who, on the July 31 that follows the end of a compliance period, has not satisfied the total reduction requirement for this compliance period must participate in the CCM and acquire compliance credits by transfer through the CCM. Should participants choose to pledge to offer to transfer compliance credits through the CCM in their Compliance Credit Balance Report and at least one primary supplier has unsatisfied requirements, the CCM will take place between August 31st and October 31st following the end of the compliance period.
author: Analysts Account
